title: Minion's Modpack
description: Build sprawling contraptions, embark on epic adventures, and conquer a world brimming with possibilities.
body:
The Minions Modpack is a love letter to the [Create Mod](https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Create_Mod_Wiki), supercharging your Minecraft experience with a meticulously curated collection of mods designed to ignite your creativity and sense of adventure. Immerse yourself in a world where intricate contraptions and whimsical machines become the cornerstone of your grand designs.

## Key Features:

**Create:** Expand the Create mod's potential with a plethora of add-ons, enabling even more complex automation, logistics, and decorative options. Construct sprawling factories, automated farms, and intricate railways to fuel your industrial ambitions.
Adventure Awaits: Embark on epic quests, explore mysterious dungeons, and conquer treacherous biomes. Discover hidden treasures, battle fearsome foes, and unravel ancient secrets as you traverse a world brimming with adventure.

**World Generation:** Transform your Minecraft landscapes with a diverse range of generation mods, adding unique biomes, structures, and terrain features. Uncover sprawling cave systems, lush forests, and towering mountains, each teeming with new resources and opportunities.
Optimized Performance: Enjoy a smooth and seamless gameplay experience with a selection of performance-enhancing mods. Optimize your world generation, rendering, and resource management to ensure your creations run at their best.

**Dungeons:** Delve into a myriad of procedurally generated dungeons, each filled with challenging puzzles, deadly traps, and valuable loot. Test your skills and courage as you face off against hordes of monsters and uncover legendary artifacts.

**Blocks and Decorations:** Enhance your builds with a vast array of new blocks, decorations, and building materials. Create stunning structures, design intricate interiors, and personalize your world how you see fit.

Whether you're a seasoned engineer, an intrepid explorer, or a creative builder, the Minions Modpack offers an unparalleled Minecraft adventure. Let your imagination run wild as you construct, explore, and conquer in a world where the possibilities are endless.

<details>

## World Generation & Biomes

**YUNG's Mods:** Better End Island, Better Ocean Monuments, Better Mineshafts, Better Nether Fortresses, Better Desert Temples, Better Jungle Temples, Better Strongholds, Bridges, Extras

**Other World Generation**: Terralith, Iceberg, When Dungeons Arise, When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas, The Aether, Incendium, Formations Nether, Tectonic, Nullscape

**Structures & Buildings:** MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures, Additional Structures, Medieval Buildings [End Edition], Dawn of Time - Builder Edition, Camps. Castles. Carriages.

## Gameplay Enhancements & Mechanics

**RPG & Progression:** RPG Origins, Lootr, XP Tome, Traveler's Titles, Bountiful, Traveler's Backpack, Origins (Forge),  Deeper and Darker, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks,  Guard Villagers, Villager Recruits

**Combat & Enemies:** Better Combat, Ice and Fire, Ice and Fire: Spellbooks, Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons, Bosses of Mass Destruction Forge, Immersive Armors, Illager Invasion, Let's Forge Bronze And Iron

**Farming & Food:** Farmer's Delight, AppleSkin, MmmMmmMmmMmm, Just Another Rotten Flesh to Leather Mod, Animal Feeding Trough

**Utilities & Tweaks:** Just Enough Items, Mouse Tweaks, Server Sleep, Waystones, Dice, GraveStone Mod, Infinity With Mending, Let Me Despawn, Dungeon Now Loading, Transmog, Mended Mending, Craftable Saddle, ParCool!

## Visuals & Aesthetics

**Graphics & Lighting:** Blue Skies, Dynamic Lights, Complementary Shaders, Better Third Person, Chunky

**Animations:** Fresh Animations, Not Enough Animations, playerAnimator

**Environment & Ambiance:** Ambient Environment, AmbientSounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Cave Dust

**Furniture & Decoration:** Fantasy's Furniture, Decorative Blocks, Medieval Deco, Another Furniture, Create Deco, Create: Interiors

## Technical & Optimization

**Libraries & APIs:** Caelus API, Cloth Config API, Geckolib, Forge Config Screens, Forgified Fabric API, Architectury API, Curios API, Structure Gel API, Puzzles Lib, YUNG's API, Integrated API, libIPN, Kotlin for Forge, Moonlight Lib, MCPitanLib

**Performance:** ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, Entity Culling, Memory Leak Fix, FerriteCore, Clumps, Cull Less Leaves Reforged, BadOptimizations

**Fixes & Compatibility:** Experimental Settings Disabler, Better Compatibility Checker, NetherPortalFix, ModernFix, Packet Fixer

## Create Mod & Addons

**Create:** Create, Create: Structures, Create Enchantment Industry, Create Goggles, Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create Slice & Dice, Create: Extended Cogwheels

**Other Addons:** Builder's Delight, Stoneworks, Double Doors

## Miscellaneous

**Other:** Naturalist, Connector Extras, FallingTree, Lionfish-API, MasterCutter, Simply Swords, Advancement Plaques, Structure Credits, Simple Voice Chat, Leaves Be Gone, Server Sleep, AI Improvements, Simple Hats, Villager Names, Searchables, Noisium, Collective, Kambrik, Pehkui, Polymorph, Small Ships, Immersive Melodies
 <summary>Mods Summary</summary>



</details>
